action_boundary: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: records disclosure to representative.
communication_boundary: Citizen-record action cannot proceed from empathy, constituent pressure, or prior case notes; current authority must close the exact boundary.

documents.text: Policy rule for Public sector / citizen records controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.
